issues.detail: Does not cover error handling or edge cases.
Assumes Node.js environment and fetch API, limiting cross-platform usage.
Uses npx to install from GitHub without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: create-product-and-fetch
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets most rubric requirements (fetch POST, error handling, correct fields) but still misses the 12‑limit and returned object structure; Response A fails to use fetch, the correct endpoint, and the required fields.

scenarios.name: setup-nextjs-commerce-bigcommerce
scenarios.rationale: Response B includes the required create-next-app command and .env.local setup, but misses the commerce.config.ts provider entry and headless-first note; Response A lacks the command, proper env vars, and provider configuration altogether.
